undercovered_slices.label: South Texas & Gulf Coast
undercovered_slices.reason: Current coverage is concentrated in Central Texas and Hill Country, with few or no candidates from the Rio Grande Valley, Corpus Christi area, or coastal metro regions.

undercovered_slices.label: Sports and adventure specialty camps
undercovered_slices.reason: The existing set is dominated by traditional overnight and college pre-college programs; specialist sports, aquatics, equestrian, and adventure leadership camps are under-represented.

undercovered_slices.label: College-hosted residential programs beyond STEM/arts
undercovered_slices.reason: University-based candidates are largely STEM or theatre focused; broader university residential offerings in business, leadership, health, or college-prep may be missing.

undercovered_slices.label: Spanish-language sources
undercovered_slices.reason: No Spanish-language or bilingual candidate sources are present, leaving a gap for Texas programs serving Spanish-speaking families and border-region schools.
